headlines.title: Democratic socialist Janeese Lewis George wins Washington, D.C., mayoral primary
headlines.description: NBC News projects Lewis George has won the Democratic nomination, setting her up to manage the capital city and its relationship with Trump.

headlines.title: Supreme Court rules for marijuana user charged under same gun law as Hunter Biden
headlines.description: The Supreme Court endorsed a marijuana user's challenge to a law that bars people who consume illegal drugs from having firearms, the same law that Hunter Biden was convicted under.

headlines.title: JD Vance no longer traveling to Switzerland tonight for negotiations with Iran
headlines.description: The thorniest issues have been left for the next round of negotiations, with big concessions made in return for the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz.

headlines.title: Rep. Tom Kean to return to Congress on June 30 after monthslong absence
headlines.description: The New Jersey Republican is up for re-election this November after missing more than 100 votes during his absence this spring.

headlines.title: Comparing Trump's newly-released Iran peace plan with Obama's
headlines.description: The White House released the text of the U.S.-Iran peace framework, including provisions that would limit Iran's nuclear ambitions. But some critics say the proposal is similar to the 2015 Obama-era deal that President Trump killed. NBC News' Andrea Mitchell reports.

headlines.title: White House defends Iran deal amid criticism
headlines.description: Vice President JD Vance touted the preliminary agreement with Iran amid criticism from some Trump allies. NBC News’ Monica Alba reports.

headlines.title: Obama Presidential Center opening ceremony
headlines.description: In Chicago, former President Barack Obama and first lady Michelle Obama were joined by three other former presidents at a star-studded opening for his presidential center. NBC News’ Kelly O’Donnell is in Chicago.

headlines.title: U.S. deportation tracker: Counting arrests, detentions and border crossings
headlines.description: President Donald Trump came into office promising the largest mass deportation in U.S history, targeting the more than 10 million unauthorized migrants living in the United States.

headlines.title: State Assemblyman Alex Bores speaks on AI and politics
headlines.description: State Assemblyman Alex Bores, a candidate for New York's 12th Congressional District, speaks with NBC News’ Gadi Schwartz about why some top artificial intelligence companies are opposing his candidacy and whether AI should play a role in politics.

headlines.title: Trump finds his Iran off-ramp in Versailles, but saves the big issues for later: From the Politics Desk
headlines.description: In today’s edition, Jonathan Allen explores what comes next for President Donald Trump on Iran after signing an agreement to end the war.

headlines.title: Sen. Slotkin to introduce bill to bar presidents from sending troops or armed federal officers to polling places
headlines.description: President Donald Trump said this year that Republicans “ought to nationalize the voting” in at least 15 places.

headlines.title: Pentagon investigation into Iran school strike being finalized
headlines.description: There is growing concern in Congress and the Pentagon that the Trump administration may make the investigation’s results classified.
